title: Laughing Emoji & Kaomoji: Copy & Paste 😂 LOL Combos
meta_description: Grab laughing emoji 😂 🤣 💀, LOL kaomoji like (≧▽≦), and ready-made meme reaction combos for comments and group chats. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: From 😂 tears of joy to 💀 dead-from-laughing memes and (≧▽≦) kaomoji — every way to laugh in text. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The laughing emoji 😂 has topped most-used-emoji lists for a decade, while 💀 and 😭 have become its meme-era replacements for "I'm dead." This page gathers every laughing emoji variant, the skull and pointing reactions Gen Z actually uses, playful giggle and smirk faces, and Japanese laughing kaomoji — plus one-click LOL combo sets for comments, replies, and group chats.

sections.label: Core Laughing Faces
sections.intro: The classic laughing faces, from polite chuckle to rolling on the floor.

sections.label: Dead From Laughing
sections.intro: The meme-speak way to say something killed you — skulls, headstones, and pointing.

sections.label: Giggles & Smirks
sections.intro: Lighter laughs — teasing smirks, tongues out, and upside-down irony.

sections.label: Kaomoji
sections.intro: Japanese-style text faces beaming, cackling, and waving their arms with joy.

collection_section.intro: Copy a whole laughing combo in one click — perfect for fast comment-section reactions.
